prompt.content:
Please update the next batch of offer outcome data in Greenhouse. Refer to Offer_Decisions.csv in the filesystem for the applications and the outcome.

In the console, please state the change in offer decline rate (in % two decimal places) from before and after this batch update, for the offers we have an outcome. Please provide a full report of your 
actions and analysis in the console.

rubrics.name: State that the change in offer decline rate from before and after the batch... (ver_ab82ad0747064222bc6e45e117f63e56)

messages.content: State that the change in offer decline rate from before and after the batch update, for the offers we have an outcome is 11.41% (acceptable range 11.30% to 11.52%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The change in offer decline rate from before and after the batch update, for the offers we have an outcome is 11.41%.
